description_long: This rifle features a futuristic design with a predominantly purple color scheme accented by lighter lavender and gray elements. The body is angular and robust, with a hexagonal pattern along the upper receiver and a prominent rail system on top. The stock is fixed and ergonomically shaped, while the grip and trigger area are integrated into the lower frame. A large, blade-like bayonet is mounted beneath the barrel, adding to its aggressive appearance. The magazine is box-shaped and appears detachable, and the sighting system is a simple iron sight integrated into the top rail.
description: A futuristic, angular purple rifle with a fixed stock, integrated iron sights, and a prominent under-barrel bayonet.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length, hexagonal upper receiver, fixed stock, and large under-barrel bayonet.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the circular muzzle, bayonet tip, and narrow profile of the rifle.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same features as view 0, with the magazine and stock clearly visible.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the end of the stock, the top rail, and the alignment of the iron sights.
